title: Auto copy Numbers column summary
excerpt: Requesting for a minor feature request, which is copying a number sum in a Number column with a single click. As of now, the sum shown at the bottom of the column is not copiable, and when I click on the sum, there are s…

posts.author: apa.transformation (APA Transformation)
posts.cookedHtml: Requesting for a minor feature request, which is copying a number sum in a Number column with a single click. As of now, the sum shown at the bottom of the column is not copiable, and when I click on the sum, there are some options to customize the summary, but no option to copy
